ops.title: tilth rip-and-replace rollout
ops.description: Replace every tilth-backed op with native implementations (ast-grep + ripgrep + git/jj composition) and flatten the backend abstraction. Four releases: v0.22 de-vendor ast-grep (shipped in this task's first commits); v0.23 native read/overview/grep; v0.24 outline fallback/diff/history; v0.25 symbol/deps/flatten/teardown. Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-02/plans/bash-cc-notes-papercut-streamed-brook.md; supersession note cd83f67.

ops.text: grep -ri tilth in the tree hits only CHANGELOG
every release ships green CI and a matching plugin.json version
